title: Mathematics Teacher (A-Level / Pre-University Foundation Programme)
description:
We are looking for a committed Full-Time/Part Time Maths TEACHER (A-Level / Pre-University Foundation Programme) to complement our qualified workforce of educators.


Responsibilities:

You will be responsible for preparing and implementing a full educational teaching plan according to the school’s requirements. It will be fundamental to provide knowledge and instruction to students while also helping them develop their personalities and skills.

Specifically:

  • Prepare and conduct lessons according to the course syllabus and scheme of work.
  • Deliver lessons and provide the necessary supervision to students as a mentor or form teacher.
  • Provide necessary supervision to the students, manage the classroom, and address discipline issues.
  • Prepare and mark examination papers and assignments.
  • Monitor the performance and progress of each student and provide academic counselling.
  • Teach students according to their aptitude (Differentiated Teaching)
  • Perform Intervention duties: Identify and discuss students’ academic and pastoral needs with parents/academic team/student relations to find a way to help students.
  • Attend team meetings and staff development workshops.
  • Enable students to attain required proficiency for university admission.
  • Perform any other tasks as may be assigned on an ad-hoc basis as needed.
  • Achieve assigned key performance indicator target.

THE IDEAL CANDIDATE:

You must be passionate about the job with an ability to reach out to students and create a relationship of mutual trust. You must know how to organize a class and make learning an easy and meaningful process. Your goal is to help cultivate the students’ interest in education and be their dedicated ally in the entire process of learning and development.


SKILL AND EXPERIENCE:

  • Min Bachelor’s degree relevant to the subject to be taught.
  • Minimum 2 years of teaching experience in Cambridge A Level / GCE A Level / Further Education ('FE') in a school setting.
  • Ability to inspire students’ interest in learning and create a strong affinity with the students.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Self-motivated, logical thinker, team player.
  • Former MOE school teachers and NIE-trained teachers welcomed
  • Candidates with PGDE Certs preferred.

postedCompany.description:
As a private education provider in Singapore, Victoria World Academy adheres to the statutory requirements of the Enhanced Registration Framework (ERF) of the Committee for Private Education. Likewise, VWA holds an Edutrust Provisional certification from CPE, after having attained a minimum level of performance in key areas of administration and provision of educational services.


Vision

Nurturing the next generation of Leaders, Innovators and Changemakers who will contribute to the society in their fields of passion.


Mission 

To provide a nurturing education enabling learners to be the best version of themselves, thereby achieving their goals in life.


Values

*Tenacity 

*Practical and Growth Mindset 

*Sociability 

*Commitment and Confidence 

*Scholastic Excellence 

*Creativity
postedCompany.name: VICTORIA WORLD ACADEMY PTE. LTD.
